'''chashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhizomatously|rhizomatously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhizomatously|rhizomatously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chashate|chashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chashatesher|chashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashatesherĂ«m|chashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chashatero|chashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chashateshĂ«|chashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashateshĂ«m|chashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichashatero|gokichashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichashateshĂ«|gokichashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashateshĂ«m|gokichashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochashankerom|gochashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochashankeshĂ«|gochashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochashankeshĂ«m|gochashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochashankeya|gochashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chashaterom|chashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashatemu|chashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chashateya|chashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichashaterom|gokichashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashatemu|gokichashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichashateya|gokichashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chashashate|chashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chashashatesher|chashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashashatesherĂ«m|chashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chashashatero|chashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chashashateshĂ«|chashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashashateshĂ«m|chashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichashashatero|gokichashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichashashateshĂ«|gokichashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashashateshĂ«m|gokichashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochashashankerom|gochashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochashashankeshĂ«|gochashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochashashankeshĂ«m|gochashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochashashankeya|gochashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chashashaterom|chashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chashashatemu|chashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chashashateya|chashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichashashaterom|gokichashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichashashatemu|gokichashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichashashateya|gokichashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠte|chĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠtesher|chĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠtero|chĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠshĂŠtero|gokichĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠterom|chĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠtemu|chĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠshĂŠteya|chĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠshĂŠterom|gokichĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠshĂŠteya|gokichĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafshafte|chafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafshaftesher|chafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafshaftesherĂ«m|chafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafshaftero|chafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafshafteshĂ«|chafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafshafteshĂ«m|chafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafshaftero|gokichafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafshafteshĂ«|gokichafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafshafteshĂ«m|gokichafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafshafnkerom|gochafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafshafnkeshĂ«|gochafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafshafnkeshĂ«m|gochafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafshafnkeya|gochafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafshafterom|chafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafshaftemu|chafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafshafteya|chafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafshafterom|gokichafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafshaftemu|gokichafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafshafteya|gokichafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
